# APEX stage to resource crosswalk

Review date: 2026-06-28
Organization: BOSS, UH APEX, UH SBDC, SCORE Houston, SBA
Process type: Stage-to-resource routing
Primary geography: Houston area, ZIP 77084 example

## Purpose
Use this file when BOSS needs to choose between APEX, SBDC, SCORE, SBA, or a professional advisor based on the user's lifecycle stage.

## Stage routing table
| Business stage | Typical user situation | Primary route | Secondary route | Do not do |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Ideation | User has an idea or skill but no formed business. | SCORE mentor or SBDC startup advising. | SBA business guide or SCORE startup resources. | Do not make UH APEX the main route. |
| Validation | User is testing customer demand, market, price, or feasibility. | SBDC advising and market research resources. | SCORE mentor and templates. | Do not jump to bids before capacity fit. |
| Formation | User is choosing entity, EIN, licenses, tax setup, or operations setup. | SBDC/SCORE/SBA education plus attorney/CPA as needed. | Local official offices. | Do not give legal or tax advice. |
| Launch | User is ready for first customers. | SCORE, SBDC, marketing resources, business plan review. | Local chambers and workshops. | Do not treat government contracting as quick revenue. |
| Operations | User has activity and needs systems, cash flow, documentation, or readiness. | SBDC advising. | SCORE mentoring. | Do not route to APEX unless government sales are a fit. |
| Growth | User wants government contracts, certifications, bids, or institutional buyers. | UH APEX. | SBA federal contracting assistance and SBDC government jumpstation. | Do not guarantee contracts or certifications. |
| Recovery | User is recovering from disaster or disruption. | SBDC disaster preparedness/recovery. | APEX disaster contracting if selling to response buyers. | Do not promise disaster loans or contracts. |
| Exit | User wants to close, sell, transfer, or transition. | Professional advisors and SBDC/SCORE for planning support. | SBA/SBDC education. | Do not provide legal, tax, valuation, or transaction advice. |

## Retrieval tags
stage crosswalk, lifecycle, APEX, SBDC, SCORE, SBA, Houston, 77084, routing
